expected_outcome: All ROS terminals use the same domain and can discover each other.

command:
source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash
source ~/yahboomcar_ws/install/setup.bash
source ~/mircoROS_agent/install/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true
export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=30
export ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY=0

cd ~/robotics/FleetSafe-VisualNav-Benchmark
source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash
export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=30
export ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY=0
make vln-desktop-radius RADIUS=0.20
expected_outcome: FleetSafe-VLN controller runs in dry-run mode.
Reports ROS, robot topics, FleetSafe topics, and LiDAR clearance.
Prints raw vs valid vs fifth-percentile clearance and CBF decision.

command: make vln-send TEXT="move forward slowly and keep at least half a meter from obstacles"
ros2 topic pub --once /fleetsafe/instruction_voice std_msgs/msg/String "{data: 'move forward slowly while avoiding nearby obstacles'}"

expected_outcome: Echoes nominal velocity command before CBF filtering.
Echoes the certificate JSON showing h_min, min_dist_m, qp_status, and safety decision.

command:
LATEST_CERT="$(ls -td results/certificates/* | head -1)"
tail -n 1 "$LATEST_CERT"/vln_certificates_m3pro.jsonl | python3 -m json.tool

expected_outcome: Creates a compact evidence folder for reproducibility.
